Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Hound]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — The will of the Hound bends Fate.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — The Hound is a white-armored, rat-faced messenger.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Makiel is the Hound and wears full battle armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — The Hound directs the Judges and guides Fate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Eithan has the vision of the Hound.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 20''' — The Hound is an entity that saw a possibility others did not.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — The Hound has observational authority.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — The techniques of a Hound can provide access to several more senses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — A Hound is a role or position within the Abidan.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
